name: local-network-file-browser
description: Local Network File Browser with Thumbnails

scripts.dev: echo "Run servers separately: Terminal 1: npm run dev:server | Terminal 2: npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.lint: npm run lint:server && npm run lint:client
scripts.format: npm run format:server && npm run format:client
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check:server && npm run format:check:client
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run format:check
